# @handamade/react

11 React 19 components consuming @handamade/tokens. Zero runtime deps, CSS Modules, ref-as-prop.

## Machine-readable artifacts
- dist/manifest.json: full component/prop inventory with types and defaults
- docs/{Component}.md: per-component docs (props, theming, variant guidance)

## Rules for generated code
- import { Button } from "@handamade/react"; import "@handamade/react/styles";
- Also import from @handamade/tokens: base.css, a theme css, components.css, utilities.css.
- size is a px number (24|32|40|48), never "sm"/"md"/"lg".
- variant vocabulary: accent | accent-subtle | neutral | neutral-subtle | ghost | danger | danger-subtle | outline.
- One accent per visual group. danger only for destructive actions.

## Button: href + outline (D33/D34)
- Button renders as an <a> when given `href` (plus optional `target`/`rel`); disabled anchors get aria-disabled, no href attribute, and pointer-events: none instead of the disabled attribute.
- `outline` is a bordered-ghost variant: visible structure, no fill until hover — good for marketing CTAs and download buttons.
- --ds-button-font overrides button typography across all sizes in one declaration; brands can set it via componentOverrides (ember → mono).

## Card
- <Card variant="stacked" | "featured" media={...} hoverLift>: stacked places media above the body, featured places media beside it (~1.6fr/1fr, stacks under the md breakpoint). hoverLift lifts the card translateY(-6px) over --ds-duration-350. Border uses --ds-border-faint.

## NavBar
- <NavBar brand={...} actions={...}>{links}</NavBar>: brand slot leading, nav links centered/inline, actions slot trailing (theme switch, CTA). Renders inside .ds-container. Background defaults to --ds-scrim-heavy so content can scroll underneath; border uses --ds-border-faint.

## AspectRatio
- <AspectRatio ratio={16/10}>{children}</AspectRatio>: a frame div with CSS aspect-ratio set from the numeric ratio prop — wrap images/media to reserve layout space before load. Combine with the .ds-media-tint utility for the brand media-tint treatment.

## Icons (22)
- Full icon set: IconPlus, IconMinus, IconCheck, IconClose, IconChevronDown, IconChevronRight, IconSearch, IconSettings, IconUser, IconEye, IconEyeOff, IconEdit, IconCopy, IconTrash, IconLoader, IconExternalLink, plus D36 additions — arrows IconArrowDown and IconArrowUpRight, and social glyphs IconLinkedIn, IconGitHub, IconX, IconInstagram.

## Compositions (recipes for what has no component yet)

- Form field: there is no Field/Label component. Compose: `<label htmlFor>` styled with `.ds-text-14-20-medium`; the control (Input/Select); error text in `.ds-text-12-16-regular` with `color: var(--ds-fg-danger)`, linked via `aria-describedby` on the control plus `aria-invalid` and `error` when invalid.
- Stacks/rows: `.ds-gap-*` utilities set only the gap — they do not create a flex/grid container. Pair them with `display: flex` (column for stacks, row for button groups).
- Native pass-through: components spread unlisted props onto their underlying element (Input → `<input>`, Select → `<select>`, Button → `<button>`/`<a>`), so `value`, `onChange`, `type`, `id`, `autoComplete`, `checked` etc. all work even though manifest.json lists only the component-specific props. Exception: Tooltip takes no host props — put handlers/attributes on its trigger child.
- Subtree theming: the standard setup is `data-ds-theme` on `<html>`. For a themed subtree, set `data-ds-theme` on a wrapper and paint `background: var(--ds-bg-primary)` yourself; brand font combos do not reach nested subtrees (see guidance.fonts.scope).
- Size selection: 32 is the default (compact UI); 40 for comfortable forms and marketing pages; 24 for inline/table-row actions; 48 for hero CTAs.
- Full semantic token roster: `@handamade/tokens/resolved/<theme>.json` has every token with resolved values — this file lists only the patterns.
